name: Idaho DOPL Contractor Registration Search

agency.name: Idaho Division of Occupational and Professional Licenses

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the DOPL contractor registration search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Idaho contractor registrations exposed by DOPL online services
knownExclusions: Electrical, HVAC, plumbing, elevator, manufactured housing, local permits, and business registration records may require separate official sources or filters.
The contractor board page is a program page and the lookup is hosted in DOPL online services; adapter work must review the lookup controls before automation.
Formal actions and unregistered-contractor actions are separate linked resources and are not normalized by this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate online-services pages unless official terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a registration, trade credential, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official contractor-registration bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Idaho DOPL contractor registrations. Future work should review whether separate DOPL trade boards need distinct source entries.
maintainerNotes: Keep contractor registrations separate from other Idaho DOPL license families until filtering is explicit.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
